content: The phone just connected. The agent is greeting you.

*listens to the greeting*

Hi, yes, I'm calling to schedule a follow-up appointment with Dr. Martinez if she has any openings soon?
The agent said: For quality and training purposes.
Oh okay, sure, that's fine.
The agent said: Calling pivot point or how can I help you today?
Yeah, I'm just looking to schedule a routine checkup with Dr. Martinez — whenever she has an opening in the next few weeks would work for me.
The agent said: Before we schedule your checkup, would you like to create a demo patient profile?
Um, I'm already a patient though — I've been seeing Dr. Martinez for a couple years now. Do I really need to create a new profile?
The agent said: Last name to get started.
Oh, it's Johnson — Sarah Johnson.
The agent said: Your patient profile is set up in your date of birth is July 4th 2000 for demo purposes.
Actually, that's not right — my date of birth is March 15th, 1991, not July 4th. Can you correct that in the system?
The agent said: Let me update your date of birth to March 15th, 1991.
Great, thanks for fixing that. So when can we look at getting me scheduled for that appointment?
The agent said: Of that.
I'm sorry, I didn't catch that — what did you say?
The agent said: Committed a request to update your date of birth to March 15th.
Okay, got it. So once that's updated, can we go ahead and find a time for my checkup?
The agent said: The clinic support. Would you still like to schedule your routine checkup? Now
Yes, absolutely — I'd like to schedule that routine checkup with Dr. Martinez. What days and times do you have available?
The agent said: I'll help you schedule a routine checkup. However, I don't see a doctor Martinez listed. It Point. Orthopedic or doctor Howser Dr. Ross and Dr. Bricker
Oh, I see — I guess Dr. Martinez might not be available. Um, can I schedule with Dr. Ross then? What times do you have open?
The agent said: Instead.
Sorry, I'm not sure what you mean — can you repeat that?
The agent said: There isn't a Dr. Martinez at Pivot Point, Orthopedics are available. Doctors are Dr. Howser Dr. Ross and Dr. Bricker
Okay, got it — I must have been mistaken about the doctor's name. I'll go with Dr. Ross then. What appointment times do you have available?
The agent said: Pick up with 1 of them. Would you prefer to see Dr? Howser Dr. Ross or Dr. Brooker for your routine. Checkup.
I'll go with Dr. Ross — that works for me. What times do you have available?
The agent said: There are no openings with Dr. Ross, this week, would you like to look for appointments later in July? Or are you open to seeing another provider sooner?
Yeah, later in July works fine for me — whenever Dr. Ross has an opening then would be great.
The agent said: I don't see any openings with Dr, Ross yet, but I do have appointments with Dr. Lyakhovsky and Dr. Noah on Tuesday, July 7th.
Hmm, okay — I'm not familiar with those doctors, but if that's what's available, I can do Tuesday, July 7th. What times do you have?
The agent said: Or should I keep looking? Here are some options for Tuesday. July 7th, Draco is openings at 10:00 a.m. and 3:00 p.m.
The 10:00 a.m. slot works for me — let's go with that one.
The agent said: At 11:00 a.m. at 11:30, a.m. would you like to book 1 of these or should I search for later dates?
Wait, I thought you said 10 a.m. was available? But okay, 11:00 a.m. works too — let's just book that one for Tuesday, July 7th.
The agent said: Your check out the schedule for Tuesday, July 7th at 11:00 a.m. with Dr. Kelly Noble at Pivot Point Orthopedics.
Okay, so that's Tuesday, July 7th at 11:00 a.m. with Dr. Kelly Noble — got it. Is there anything else I need to do, or am I all set?
The agent said: Your appointment is all set for July 7th at 11:00 a.m. with Dr. Noble is there anything else you'd like help with today?
No, that's everything — thanks for getting me scheduled. I'll see you on July 7th!
The agent said: You're all set for July 7th at 11:00 a.m. with Dr. Noble, have a great day.
Thanks, you too — bye!
